label: Claim Quality

deductions.reason: L1 claims anchor board-relevant learning objectives.
deductions.suggestedFix: Promote high-yield Orthobullets and Anki signals to L1 claims.

deductions.reason: Draft claims cannot be consumed as verified educational content.
deductions.suggestedFix: Route claims through human review queue before publication.

deductions.finding: Insufficient evidence support on claim proposals
deductions.reason: Every claim should cite supporting evidence.
deductions.suggestedFix: Attach evidence_refs from evidence packet to each claim proposal.

recommendations: Promote high-yield Orthobullets and Anki signals to L1 claims.
Route claims through human review queue before publication.
Attach evidence_refs from evidence packet to each claim proposal.
